vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/not visible. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present, anchored by the white rabbit figurine.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No specimen detected in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No identifiable mint foliage present.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos specimen confirmed by foliage near the white rabbit anchor.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No identifiable silver guest foliage present.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface; no botanical activity.
plant_audit.P2_P4_Black_Pot: Contains a single, thin, etiolated green stem/sprout. No evidence of Mexican Mint or Silver Guest characteristics.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Pothos leaf visible; appears stable but isolated.

biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells in the P2/P4 pot indicates a deliberate soil amendment or pest-deterrent intervention. A white cable/wire has been introduced into the frame in later images.

vision_report.temporal_deltas: From Earliest to Current: The primary change is the loss of visible foliage in the P2/P4 pot, leaving only a single, struggling sprout. The P3 Pothos remains static. The introduction of eggshells suggests an attempt to bolster soil health or manage pests.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of severe decline. The lack of expected species suggests either total mortality or extreme dormancy. The single sprout in the P2/P4 pot is etiolated, indicating insufficient light for healthy development.
anomalies: Crushed eggshells in P2/P4 pot (New Intervention).
White cable/wire introduced to the desk environment (New Intervention).
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is currently failing to support the registered species. The yellow pot (P1) is barren. The black pots show minimal biological activity, with the exception of a single, weak sprout and a solitary Pothos leaf. The presence of eggshells suggests a recent, perhaps desperate, attempt to improve soil conditions. The overall health is poor, characterized by significant loss of biomass.
